name: Collection O Peunayong Near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Formerly Siwah Hotel

reviews.originalComment:
Menginap di Collection O Siwah Hotel (sekarang dikenal sebagai Collection O Peunayong Near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman) menawarkan pengalaman liburan yang strategis di jantung kota Banda Aceh.

Ringkasan Pengalaman Menginap
Hotel bintang 2 ini populer di kalangan wisatawan karena keseimbangan antara harga yang terjangkau dan lokasi yang sangat dekat dengan berbagai ikon wisata.

Lokasi Strategis: Terletak di kawasan Peunayong, hotel ini hanya berjarak sekitar 1 km dari Masjid Raya Baiturrahman dan Museum Tsunami, yang bahkan bisa dicapai dengan berjalan kaki.

Fasilitas Kamar: Kamar-kamar terbaru dilengkapi dengan Android TV, WiFi gratis, AC yang sudah dinyalakan sebelum tamu datang, dan kamar mandi dengan pancuran rainfall.

Pelayanan: Staf dikenal ramah dan sigap dalam membantu kebutuhan tamu.

Detail Fasilitas & Harga
Berdasarkan data terbaru untuk rencana menginap di tahun 2026:
Harga: Mulai dari sekitar Rp374.000 per malam (bervariasi tergantung platform dan tanggal pemesanan).

Kelebihan: Kamar lumayan luas dan parkir gratis.

Catatan: Beberapa ulasan menyebutkan masalah teknis pada pintu kamar mandi di unit tertentu, namun kebersihan secara umum dinilai baik.

Aktivitas Liburan Terdekat
Karena lokasinya di pusat kota, Anda dapat dengan mudah menikmati:
Wisata Religi & Sejarah: Kunjungan ke Masjid Raya Baiturrahman dan Lapangan Blang Padang.

Wisata Kuliner: Menjelajahi kawasan Peunayong yang terkenal dengan berbagai pilihan makanan lokal Aceh.
Belanja: Dekat dengan Pasar Ikan dan pusat perbelanjaan lokal.

Hotel ini merupakan pilihan ideal bagi pelancong dengan anggaran terbatas yang mengutamakan aksesibilitas ke pusat aktivitas kota Banda Aceh.
reviews.reviewComments:
Staying at Collection O Siwah Hotel (now known as Collection O Peunayong Near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman) offers a strategic holiday experience in the heart of Banda Aceh.

Stay Experience Summary
This 2-star hotel is popular among tourists due to the balance between affordable prices and its very close location to various tourist icons.

Strategic Location: Located in the Peunayong area, the hotel is only about 1 km from Masjid Raya Baiturrahman and the Tsunami Museum, which can even be reached on foot.

Room Facilities: The latest rooms are equipped with Android TV, free WiFi, air conditioning turned on before guests arrive, and bathrooms with rainfall showers.

Service: The staff are known for being friendly and quick to assist guests' needs.

Facility & Price Details
Based on the latest data for stay plans in 2026:
Price: Starting at around Rp374,000 per night (varies depending on the platform and booking date).

Advantages: Rooms are quite spacious and there is free parking.

Note: Some reviews mentioned technical issues with bathroom doors in certain units, but cleanliness is generally rated well.

Nearby Holiday Activities
Due to its location in the city center, you can easily enjoy:
Religious & Historical Tourism: Visits to Masjid Raya Baiturrahman and Blang Padang Field.

Culinary Tourism: Exploring the Peunayong area known for a variety of Acehnese local food options.
Shopping: Close to Fish Market and local shopping centers.

This hotel is an ideal choice for budget travelers prioritizing accessibility to the activities in Banda Aceh.

reviews.reviewPositives: We spent a night just for transit only
reviews.reviewNegatives: Very old and unmaintained hotel. What is shown in the picture is totally different.

reviews.originalComment: Tempat yg strategis,  pelayanan yg ramah,  dgn harga yg terjangkau.  Best recommended
reviews.reviewComments: A strategic location, friendly service, and affordable prices. Best recommended.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good for a night if visiting the city before onward to Pulau Weh
reviews.reviewPositives: The staff was very helpful and ordered me a grab to the airport to save me money. The wifi worked well. The room although very old was spacious and comfortable. Good food nearby and just a 10-15 minute walk to the grand mosque.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Very old hotel and a bit run down but fine for a night or 2. Not exactly soundproof rooms and can hear the neighbors coming and going.

reviews.reviewTitle: Cheap accommodation in the city center
reviews.originalComment: Kawasan nya memang pemginapan semua, akses dekat kemana mana ,dan harga jauh miring jika pesan via apk Agoda
reviews.reviewComments: The area is indeed all accommodations, access is close to everywhere, and the prices are much lower if you book via the Agoda app.

reviews.reviewPositives: confort of the bed, space in the room
reviews.reviewNegatives: no windows, no atmosphere, just nothing

reviews.originalComment: Allhamdullilah, kami senang nginap dsana. Pelayanannya Ramah. Kabar Bersih dan Wangii. Acc dingin, jaringan Wifi lancar. InsyaAllah balik lagi kesini.
reviews.reviewComments: Allhamdulillah, we are happy to stay there. The service is friendly. The place is clean and fragrant. The air conditioning is cool, and the Wi-Fi connection is smooth. InsyaAllah we will return here.

reviews.reviewPositives: La calidad precio, el personal muy amable y buena ubicación
reviews.reviewNegatives: Que no hay ventanas

reviews.reviewTitle: Great, the receptionist is friendly and we stayed as a group of three without being asked to add an extra bed, the service is good, guests feel comfortable, and the location is close to the city center, not far from the market to buy snacks or souvenirs.
reviews.originalTitle: mantap, resepsionis ramah dan kita menginap bertiga tdk ada diauruh nambah bed extra , pelayanannya bagus , tamu pun jd nyaman , letaknya dekat pusat kota tdk jauh dr pasar tuk beli oleh² atau souveni
reviews.originalComment: next time kita nginap disini lg, krn selain murah jg pelayanannya ramah
reviews.reviewComments: Next time we stay here again, because besides being cheap, the service is also friendly.

reviews.reviewTitle: Super localisation et mille merci pour le personnel
reviews.reviewPositives:
Waw that was great 
Tout était super super surtout le personnel et la réceptionniste qui m’as aider sur différents services …. merci encore pour tout

reviews.reviewTitle: Super localisation et mille merci pour le personnel
reviews.reviewPositives:
Waw that was great 
Tout était super super surtout le personnel et la réceptionniste qui m’as aider sur différents services …. merci encore pour tout

reviews.originalComment: Menginap di sini saya puas. Luar htel biasa saja. Pas di dalam sangat2 puas. Terutama di staff nya. Cantik2 dan ganteng2 manis murah senyum
reviews.reviewComments: I am satisfied staying here. The outside of the hotel is just ordinary. But inside, I am very satisfied. Especially with the staff. They are all beautiful and handsome, sweet, and they smile a lot.

reviews.reviewPositives: Hotel dlm town, dekat dgn masjid raya baiturrahman, dkt dgn kedai ole2, shopping center, kedai2 kopi, makan.
reviews.reviewNegatives: No soap & shampoo. Tilam tidak empuk, sgt terasa besi² dalam tilam. Tiada lift, perlu naik tangga tidak sesuai utk wargamas spt kami ada yg umur sudah 74 thn. Sukar utk angkat bagasi ke atas, bawa turun ke bawah.

reviews.originalComment: Baru pertama menginap di hotel ini dan kakak resepsionisnya super ramah, begitu datang langsung disambut dengan senyuman dan tanpa menunggu lama langsung diberikan kunci kamar, kamar luar biasa luas dan kebersihannya sungguh istimewa, pokoknya terbaik di kelasnya dan sepertinya saya pasti akan kembali lagi kesini dimasa yang akan datang saat berkunjung ke Banda Aceh. Cari makan dan keperluan lainnya sangat dekat dan terjangkau karena letaknya pas di jantung kota Banda Aceh 👍
reviews.reviewComments: This was my first time staying at this hotel and the reception staff were super friendly, upon arrival I was greeted with a smile and without a long wait, I was given the room key. The room was incredibly spacious and the cleanliness was truly exceptional, it's definitely the best in its class and I will surely return here in the future when I visit Banda Aceh. Finding food and other necessities is very close and affordable because it's located right in the heart of Banda Aceh. 👍

reviews.reviewPositives: Lokasi strategik untuk ke mana-mana dan ke tempat makan.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Suhu penyaman udara dan penyelenggaraan kurang

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya bersih dan nyaman. Stafnya sangat ramah dan membantu. Kamar luas dan fasilitas lengkap. Wifi sangat lancar. Lokasinya sangat strategis, kemana-mana dekat. Pokoknya kalau datang lagi, bakal menginap lagi disini.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean and comfortable. The staff is very friendly and helpful. The room is spacious and has complete facilities. The Wi-Fi is very fast. The location is very strategic, close to everywhere. Overall, if I come back, I will definitely stay here again.

reviews.reviewPositives: Lokasi strategis dekat dengan 🕌 Baiturrahman. Aneka Kuliner di malam hari 😋 juga disekitar lokasi.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Perlu peremajaan fasilitas WC & kamar mandi 🙏. Terutama mohon air hangat diaktifkan ya👍

reviews.originalComment:
Menginap sudah kedua kalinya disini oktober 2025 dan 25 s/d 27  januari 2026
Sangat puas dengan kebersihan,fasilitas dan pelayanan hotel
Mantap
reviews.reviewComments: Stayed here for the second time in October 2025 and from January 25 to 27, 2026. Very satisfied with the cleanliness, facilities, and service of the hotel. Excellent!

reviews.reviewPositives: bersih wangi dan cepat juga ramah

reviews.reviewComments: Saya menginap 3 malam dan sangat selesa. Bilik sangat luas (compare to price per night). Lokasi sangat strategik dan kawasan tidak terlalu padat. Akan menetap lagi di hotel ini di masa depan!

reviews.reviewPositives: Очень доброжелательный и вежливый персонал. Помогли и подсказали что и где найти.

reviews.originalComment: Selalu balik lagi kesini karena tempatnya strategis, dan mudah dijangkau. Pelayananpun sangat ramah dan mudah.
reviews.reviewComments: I always return here because the location is strategic and easily accessible. The service is also very friendly and convenient.

reviews.reviewTitle: Z powodu zagrożenia higienicznego i obecności robaków byliśmy zmuszeni opuścić obiekt, bez zwrotu kosztów.
reviews.reviewPositives: Niestety nie jesteśmy w stanie wskazać żadnych pozytywnych aspektów pobytu, ponieważ warunki w obiekcie były nieakceptowalne.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Pokój był w bardzo złym stanie higienicznym. Widoczna była pleśń na ścianach, panował intensywny zapach wilgoci, a w pomieszczeniu znajdowały się robaki, co wskazywało na długotrwałe zaniedbania. Warunki były niezgodne z opisem i zdjęciami w ofercie. Ze względu na bezpieczeństwo naszego dziecka musieliśmy natychmiast opuścić pokój. Mimo to obiekt nie dokonał  zwrotu pieniędzy.

reviews.reviewTitle: The room is nice and clean.
reviews.originalComment: Saya sangat puas dengan pengalaman menginap di hotel ini. Lokasinya sangat strategis, dekat dengan pusat perbelanjaan. Kamar yang saya tempati sangat bersih, nyaman.
reviews.reviewComments: I am very satisfied with my stay at this hotel. Its location is very strategic, close to the shopping center. The room I occupied was very clean and comfortable.

reviews.reviewPositives: Situacio
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Papelera plena dels antics clients
Molt cutre
Sense finestra
Dejadesa 
Poca neteja
Impossible dlormir amb la llum del passadis oberta tota la nit

reviews.originalComment: Kami sangat senang cara pelayanan petugas ramah tamah, terutama yg kakak2 pakai kerudung bawa anak kecil. Subhanallah.. sungguh adem rasanya. Sampai anak kami yang kecil saat turun dr lantai 3 sering ngobrol sama kakaknya krna begitu ramah. Begitu juga dg abgnya yg petugas di loby hotel, sering kami di ajak ngobrol gitu. Jarang rasanya ada hotel yg pelayanan seramah itu. Udah kamar murah kualitas bintang lima.. pokoknya mantap dah.. isnya Allah kami kalau ke banda akan selalu singgah ke hotdl ini..
reviews.reviewComments: We are very happy with the service from the friendly staff, especially the sisters wearing hijabs who are with small children. Subhanallah.. it feels so comforting. Even our little child often chats with the sister when going down from the third floor because she is so friendly. The same goes for the brother who works in the hotel lobby; we often get invited to chat by him as well. It feels rare to find a hotel with such friendly service. The rooms are inexpensive, with five-star quality.. it’s just great.. God willing, when we go to Banda, we will always stop by this hotel..

reviews.reviewPositives: The staff was friendly.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The bedsheets were dirty, there was no toilet paper initially, and the Wi-Fi did not work properly. Additionally, there is no reliable signal in the bedroom, leaving you without internet service.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel bersih, nyaman tenang. Jangankan kamar, lobby nya aja dingin.. Utk harga segitu di pusat kota banda aceh, sangat direkomendasikan
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, comfortable, and quiet. Not just the rooms, even the lobby is cool. For that price in the city center of Banda Aceh, it is highly recommended.

reviews.reviewPositives: Very friendly staff, comfortable beds and walking distance from good cafes and restaurants

reviews.reviewTitle: Cheap, clean, in the city center
reviews.originalComment: Hotel sederhana tapi akomodasi yg cukup memadai, mudah diakses karena berada di pusat kota, dekat dgn berbagai kuliner dan sovenir lokal
reviews.reviewComments: Simple hotel but with adequate accommodations, easily accessible as it is located in the city center, close to various local cuisine and souvenirs.

reviews.reviewPositives: Location right in town, near to restaurant, food stall, BNI Atm
reviews.reviewNegatives: All ok

reviews.originalComment:
Sudah berulang ulang inap di hotel ini,murah,bersih dan lokasinya ditengah kota,mudah kulineran dan dekat kemana mana.
Pegawainya ramah dan helpfull, suasana nya tenang.
Selamat mencoba,terimakasih
reviews.reviewComments: I have stayed at this hotel multiple times, it is affordable, clean, and located in the city center, making it easy to find food and close to everywhere. The staff is friendly and helpful, and the atmosphere is calm. Enjoy your stay, thank you.

reviews.reviewPositives: price
reviews.reviewNegatives: less facilities like soap and drinking water

reviews.originalComment: Murah, bersih, staf ready terus. Waktu itu saya checkin jam 00.10wib dan staf masih melayani. Recommended deh
reviews.reviewComments: Inexpensive, clean, staff always ready. At that time I checked in at 00:10 WIB and the staff were still serving. Highly recommended!

reviews.reviewPositives: Perfect position in Banda Aceh, clean, friendly staff.......
reviews.reviewNegatives: Fridge out of order!!

reviews.originalComment:
Tidak sangka dapat sarapan pagi sepanjang nginap di hotel ini padahal harga low budget. Lokasi hotel Dekat ke Masjid Baiturrahman,Kapal Apung PLTD,pusat kota,pusat jajanan,pasar tradisional & pasar ole-ole.  
Terima kasih team semuanya. Terima kasih hotek Siwah. Mantaaap lha. ****
reviews.reviewComments: I didn't expect to have breakfast during my stay at this hotel even though the price is low budget. The location of the hotel is close to Baiturrahman Mosque, PLTD Floating Ship, the city center, food stalls, traditional markets, and souvenir markets. Thank you to the whole team. Thank you, Hotel Siwah. It's awesome! ****

reviews.reviewNegatives: Our stay is including breakfast, but they didn’t  serve us breakfast. There is no restaurant or kitchen.

reviews.originalComment: Nginep satu malam, lokasi di tengah kota mudah untuk cari makanan dan dekat dengan pertokoan spearpat mobil. Cocok untuk yg bawa mobil sendiri bisa gampang ke bengkel kalau ada yg mau di servis.
reviews.reviewComments: I stayed for one night, the location in the city center makes it easy to find food and is close to car spare parts shops. It is suitable for those who drive their own car as it's easy to get to a workshop if anything needs servicing.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good for a night or two, but it could be kept cleaner.
reviews.reviewPositives: Good value for price, and the staff was very helpful. It had everything I needed.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Not very clean, so not very comfortable.

reviews.originalComment:
Liburan jadi asyik dengan menginap di hotel siwah.
Hotel nya bersih tidurnya nyenyak
reviews.reviewComments: Holidays become enjoyable by staying at Siwah Hotel. The hotel is clean and the sleep is sound.

reviews.reviewPositives: Very friendly receptionist. Very good location. Remarkable price (£6)! Room was clean and adequate.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Very smokey in lobby - not sure why they don't insist people sit on the chairs provided outside the entrance.
Beware of interconnecting room. We had VERY noisy children next door til almost midnight. Obviously not the hotel's fault but parents should have some respect.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel sangat bagus pokoknya aku rekomendasi ini hotel,hotelnya sangat dekat ke masjid raya hanya 8 menit.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is very nice, I definitely recommend this hotel, it is very close to the grand mosque, only 8 minutes.

reviews.reviewPositives: Frendly staff
reviews.reviewNegatives: No windows in the room.

reviews.originalComment: overall semuanya bagus, tempat yang strategis di pusat kota, jadi gampang kemana2. stafnya juga ramah, bersih. 3hari di banda aceh selalu nginap disini. Recommended 👍
reviews.reviewComments: Overall, everything is great, a strategic location in the city center, so it's easy to go anywhere. The staff is also friendly and the place is clean. Stayed here for 3 days in Banda Aceh. Recommended 👍

reviews.reviewPositives: Had 50% offer which was attractive
reviews.reviewNegatives:
No hot water 
The tv subscription hadn't been paid so no Vidio channel . Struggled watching a YouTube movie having to work around non stop commercial breaks on to local t

reviews.originalComment: Jika anda berkunjung ke Banda Aceh dan ingin menginap di hotel yang strategis, bersih, resepsionisnya ramah, ekonomis dikantong SIWAH HOTEL adalah pilihan terbaik
reviews.reviewComments: If you visit Banda Aceh and want to stay in a strategically located, clean hotel with friendly receptionists and economical prices, SIWAH HOTEL is the best choice.

reviews.reviewTitle: Affordable family hotel in the city center.
reviews.originalTitle: Hotel keluarga murah di tengah kota
reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya di tengah kota, harga murah, bersih, reception baik, bisa toleransi sedikit wkt chek out
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is in the city center, affordable, clean, with a good reception, and can tolerate a slightly late check-out.

reviews.originalComment:
Hotel ini murah tdk murahan,ac dingin,lokasi di area sparepart kendaraan,10menit jalan kaki ke pasar kartini,10menit ke pusat oleh2, 7menit ke transkuta raja, 5 menit ke toko2 jual hp,dekat ke atm Bank Aceh.BSI dan Maybank. Atm bca ada di alfamart samping halte trans. 
Kalo malam bnyk penjual makanan.
Sebaiknya bawa perlengkapan mandi,hanya menyediakan handuk.
Sebelumnya tanyakan kamar yg ada air panas nya,bila suka dgn mandi hangat.wifi ada,namun kalo malam lemot.
reviews.reviewComments: This hotel is affordable without being cheap, with cold air conditioning, located in the vehicle spare parts area, a 10-minute walk to Kartini market, 10 minutes to the souvenir center, 7 minutes to Transkuta Raja, 5 minutes to mobile phone shops, and close to ATMs for Bank Aceh, BSI, and Maybank. The BCA ATM is at the Alfamart next to the Trans stop. In the evening, there are many food vendors. It is recommended to bring your own toiletries, as only towels are provided. It is advisable to ask about rooms with hot water if you prefer warm showers. Wi-Fi is available, but it can be slow at night.

reviews.originalComment: Siwah hotel letaknya sangat stratetegis berada di pusat kota banda aceh, fasilitas yang ditawarkan pun tidak kalah bersaing dengan hotel-hotel lainnya, ditambah lagi dengan pelayanan yang sangat humanis dan ramah menjadikannya salah satu hotel favorit di kota banda aceh.
reviews.reviewComments: Siwah hotel is strategically located in the city center of Banda Aceh, and the facilities offered are equally competitive with other hotels. Moreover, the very humane and friendly service makes it one of the favorite hotels in Banda Aceh.

reviews.reviewTitle: The comfort at Siwah Hotel is extraordinary.
reviews.originalTitle: Luar biasa kenyamanan di siwah hotel
reviews.originalComment: Bagi yg butuh tempat penginapan segera dtang ke siwah hotel,karna ini sangat rekomen bnget...
reviews.reviewComments: For those in need of accommodation, hurry to Siwah Hotel, because it is highly recommended...

Old-style, very clean budget hotel with strong aircon and wifi.
Cheap street-food places are 5 minutes' walk away.

reviews.reviewTitle: Staying for the journey to and from Sabang.
reviews.originalTitle: Menginap untuk menuju dan pulang dari sabang
reviews.originalComment:
Pesan melalui Agoda harga kamar di bawah 100rb/malam sudah dapat 2 botol air minum, handuk, dan peralatan mandi.
AC nya dingin. Ada tv dan kulkas tapi tidak tau berfungsi dengan baik atau tidak. Lokasi nya sangat dekat dengan masjid raya
reviews.reviewComments: Booking through Agoda for a room under 100,000 IDR/night already includes 2 bottles of drinking water, towels, and toiletries. The air conditioning is cold. There is a TV and refrigerator, but I don't know if they function properly. The location is very close to the grand mosque.
For the price, having been provided with an android tv and a new aircon unit is truly good value for money. The staff was very welcoming.

reviews.reviewTitle: A hotel in the city center with affordable prices.
reviews.originalTitle: Hotel ditengah kota dengan harga bersahabat
reviews.originalComment: Hotel ditengah kota dengan harga bersahabat dikantong, staffnya melayani dengan ramah. Kalau buat istirahat sangat cukup nyaman. Titik lokasi diaplikasi menuju ke hotel tidak sesuai sangat jauh melenceng,diperbaiki biar jangan banyak orang keliru
reviews.reviewComments: A hotel in the city center with pocket-friendly prices, the staff serves with kindness. It's quite comfortable for resting. The location on the app leading to the hotel is not accurate and is very far off, it should be fixed to avoid confusion for many people.

reviews.originalComment: lumayan laa harga nya murah, ga ribet pas check in nya ABG" disitu juga ramah walau cuacanya yang ga ramah
reviews.reviewComments: The price is quite good, not complicated during check-in and the staff there are friendly even though the weather is not pleasant.
Guys this so much value for the money. The room is big the ac is good the shower is hot. The stuff is nice. I stayed 15 days. It was really pleasant. So thank you siwah hotel.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi hotel yang berada di kota, mudah cari makan, pelayanan hotel cukup baik dan kebersihan hotel cukup baik
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel location is in the city, easy to find food, the hotel service is quite good, and the cleanliness of the hotel is also quite good.

Suitable for budgets hotel , near with Bandar Aceh . But during my booking the room fully booked but the reception replace my room hotel but at diferrent branch . Almost 10 minit from original place . But the new one near a cafe coffee . More comfortable

Kamar nya bersih dan rapi ac nya dingin
Pelayanan ramah
Dengan harga terjangkau bisa menginap dengan nyaman

Cheap location to stay if you find a good deal on agoda.
Close to many eateries.
The only problem is it gets too noisy if you want an early night and the mattress was uncomfortable.
Once again, you get what you paid for.
I Just look for a hotel in my way to samosir island, a d this one is ok, place for motorbike inside and near main road

kamar lumanyan bersih, fasilitas memadai ada TV (masih tv tabung), chiller, lemari, meja dan kursi, kendala cuma di air yang hanya ada air dingin saja tanpa pemanas, overall sesuai harga, untuk backpaker traveler sangat rekomended
Signal hp susah banget, udahlah wifinya gak bisa, kapok deh kemaren, tv nya pun gak hidup, kayak di penjara aja gw kamren

reviews.originalComment: Kamarnya bersih & strategis, dekat kemana2, staf ramah, tapi kurangnya di lobi nya bau rokok menyengat, padahal area dilarang merokok, tapi overall hotel ini rekomended
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean and strategic, close to everything, the staff is friendly, but the downside is the lobby has a strong cigarette smell, even though the area is non-smoking. Overall, this hotel is recommended.

reviews.reviewTitle: Spacious, no hot water for either shower or hot drink
reviews.reviewComments: Toilet door lock is not fixed well. Spacious room but with no window but in agoda app it says city view. TV does not work. No kettle to boil water.   May be room is unused for long time due to the fact that dusts everywhere. Overall, the price is acceptable with the prevailing situation.

reviews.reviewTitle: Strategic location in the older part of Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Surrounded by goodie shops, the famous Mi Razali (Aceh's yellow noodles), Nasi Goreng Days (traditional fried rice), etc..
Good enough

The price is cheap. But I smelled something bad on the hotel coridor.
Overall, I love the room.
Good location, clean room, kind staff
Near Baiturrahman mosque. Large room for family
Kalau nanti saya ke Aceh, Indonesia saya akan cuba nginap di sini lagi
Friendly stuff, nice stay.
Terbaik
Hotel bagus. Bersih. Staff juga sangat ramah dan bagus! Mmg on top!
Good
ALL GOOD 3 NIGHTS STAY. WILL STAY AGAIN IN FUTURE.
Good but lacks maintenance
Bersih dan dekat kemana mana 🥳
Recommended for business traveler,
Near the central of city, has plenty of foodcourt nearby
For backpackers it would good.

Overall is so-so.

Basic necessities & nothing fancy about this hotel or probably i should call it "guesthouse".
Walking distance around 10-15 mins to nearest souvenir/dining shop areas. 
Suitable for budget/non-fussy traveler & those who only need place to sleep at night. 
No lift in the building.

reviews.reviewTitle: Happening area, but hotel is basic
reviews.reviewComments: Breakfast is not great, just some rice with fish or chicken. Run down rooms and a bit grimey. The are is good though with a lot of shopping and food close by.

For those bag packer need budget hotel at comfortable place, this would be the place. The price was value for money. Breakfast were provided. Everything was good. No elevator. The highest floor is 3rd floor but everything was satisfying.
Really affordable

Location is good
Room and toilet is ok 
Value for money, expensive 


Very bad wifi, level 2 and 3 there is no signal
There is no elevator.
Lobby is very hot.
Please go to other hotel

I booked and paid for a room at this hotel. When me and my 2 young kids arrived there at 9 pm I was told they had no rooms available even though I had a confirmation and I had already paid. They refused to give me a room even though my kids and I were stranded as all hotels in the area were fully booked. It was only when it was pointed out to the employee that he still had 1 key in his drawer did he acknowledged there was actually 1 room still available.  But he initially refused to give it to me as it was a larger room than I had paid for.  After an hour of begging and calls to agoda did the employee finally agree to give me the room.

reviews.reviewTitle: Budget Cost Hotel with Excellent Services and Locations
reviews.reviewComments: I stayed at this hotel for 4 nights. At first night I was upset is there is a connecting door between two room which have single bed facilities. Maybe I will thank this facilities if I come as a family traveler. However it was nothing compared to great services from this hotel such as simple delicious breakfast (hot coffee or tea would be better instead of cup water), hot water, refrigerator, toilet amenities, the clean towels in every day (except first day I had stained towel), clean bedroom and mattress, and strategic location to find meals for dinner or souvenirs on night. Overall, I would like to stay in this hotel again, and I would rate this hotel as five stars low budget cost hotel.
We just spende a night there to catch pur flight in the morning, the room is really simple but clean and relatively cheap, not bad.
it is ok too stay here because it is cheap. the room are tidy but the floor not so clean. however they provide slipper for you. overall i satisfy stay in here.

reviews.reviewTitle: The room that I sayed aircondition not that cool and tv not clear .
reviews.reviewComments: The bath room  was flood due to the overflow of water . Location good and easy to find food.

Recomended hotel for budget. I got what I have paid.  I stayed in room 312 (level 3 by stairs & no lift) for 1 night. Big room,  free for 2 bottles of mineral water, slipper, & toiletries. But i got the torn bed cover. The hot water could not work. Overall, it was OK.  It was very close with culinery area & souvenir shops. I alwasys walk to Masjid Raya in 1 Km.
Friendly nice stuff.room was good
Asik stay at this hotel, murah dan nyaman
Nice to stay At this hotel, ada harga ada kwalitas
good facility great location
Nice to stay at this hotel
i stayed here for 2 nights, a nice place to stay near to masjid agung baiturrahman, museum tsunami. got internet access. i booked standard room, got tv also. overall i very satisfied stayed here. tq

slightly wait at checkin, friendly+helpfully staff, excellent location in peunayong, a lot of food culinary near hotel, quite small room but fair enough for 2people, great hot water shower, wifi only reach lobby & 2nd floor, and we can take away breakfast. recommended for the price.

The hotel is near to places to eat and souvenior shops.  If you dont mind with the following you can stay there:
1. Windowless room: stuffy and dim
2. Dirty floor and toilet
3. Moldy bed linen
4. Old and torn towel
5. Thin wall: you can hear many sound, even snoring customer next to your room.

But...if you are on budget and dont mind the above, what the heck...this is wonderful place for your vacation. Another plus: minibar
Good location with brilliant staffs
Recommended

Bad service from the reception. We did called the hotel to inform that our late check-in for 2 rooms.  When we arrived, only 1 room available. After arguments, when only they arranged another room but no apologise words come from them.
Easy walking distance or short bicak ride to the mosque and museums. Also right around the corner from night food market. Very helpful staff and wifi available in lobby. Great breakfast!
Overall it is a good budget hotel. Howver the staff is quite rude, it can be improved. asked for iron but they only got 1, so it is unavailable. huhuu..
Smoker everywhere.. Bad smell.. Wifi only at loby area..

reviews.reviewTitle: Good hotel and worth for short trip
reviews.reviewComments: very convenience for all travellers

Good basic hotel.  Ask for Queen bed but got twin bed ( :( ) even when you book earlier. Free wifi but only in lobby area. Ask for room near to lobby if wanna use wifi from your room .  Walking distance to Masjid Raya.
lucky just 1 night here, the simple breakfast is acceptable, is only 1 packet of rice and water. the bed condition very dirty, nothing much can say...

Overall ok but have to improve more. It is better if every room got internet wifi. Room is clean but toilet not really clean. Must to clean up more and more. Location is strategic. Price also good for budget holiday.
Probably the dingiest place I have ever stayed.

I'm staying at Room 204 1st Floor
Room OK
Hot Water OK
Aircond OK
Staff OK
Breakfast Nasi Bungkus - Nice OK
Value for Money - OK
Overall accomodation was good. Friendly staff. Near to food stalls/restaurant make it easy to find place to eat even at night. Not far from pasar aceh with walking distance.
I had a comfortable stay here. The only problem was that it was hard to adjust the shower temperature. Almost scalded myself.
Big and clean. Near the nigth market and the mesjid
You've got for what you've paid.. if I come back to Aceh again next time, I will stay here.. tq
It's cheap so don't expect wonders. They could do better.
Roomy and clean. Near the Grand Mosque, a walking distance away.
The hotel is simple but conveniently located in the centre close to the night markets and some restaurants for dinner. The WiFi in the lobby is strong.
The room is quite spacious, cleanliness, nice bed. And the price also reasonable.

This hotel is suitable for budget travelers. The location is near to many major attractions in Banda Acheh. All room WITHOUT windows. Have TV, freezer and all basic necessities that we need. If you need clean and low budget hotel, you can consider this hotel.
good to stay at this hotel

The location is great,you can walk to buy souvenirs or to buy food.Walking distance to Mee Razali and murtabak telur.Safe for solo traveler.Easy to find beca to go anywhere ,24 mart in front,you only need to cross the road.
I dont like because staff also smoking inside hotel.
The price is the ultimate plus point. The hotel is relatively clean considering the price. Bring your own toiletries. The location is perfect, local shops and cafes are by walking distance.

reviews.reviewTitle: Don't expect more than a comfortable night.
reviews.reviewComments:
It's a conveniently situated spot for a single night. The hotel could benefit a refresh painting, but is clean and offers a great comfort for value. 

No charm and basic breakfast, but sufficient warm water and AC. No noise disturbance.
love to stay at this hotel
love to stay at this hotel room
Cheap, strategic locations, only bad things - slow wifi & only at lobby
The boss is very friendly, the room is very good, the food is delicious, very good experience!

reviews.reviewTitle: prompt action from hotel staff.. send towels when they forgotten..
reviews.reviewComments: so far so good.. very comfortable
A nice hotel with good location.
Good location, near to food stalls & other shops.
The Hotel Is Very Smelly.. I Can't Even Sleep With The Smell Of Smoke..

Good location

what you pay is what you get.

one of the best budget hotel in Banda aceh. finding food just walking distance

what you pay is what you get.
one of the best budget hotel in Banda aceh. finding food just walking distance.

reviews.reviewTitle: would be a decent option if well maintained...
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel was probably a decent option once open. Unfortunately, as with many places in Indonesia, it has deteriorated with time due to poor maintainance - dirty walls, no thorough cleaning and in top of that our windowless room had this funny smell.  No WiFi in the room.
breakfast to be better and more choice.
Staff were fairly helpful.  Good market near by.  Clean, comfy rooms with breakfast in the morning.  Recommend for a one night stop.
Near with the city and its clean whats more important.

Very poor value for the money compared to the rest of Indonesia. 
Old room that needs painting and general refurbishing. The walls are dirty and look like they have not been painted for a decade. No windows in the room, just a cristal bricks wall to let some light in from the corridor. 
The mattress is old and you can feel the springs getting into your back at night. 
I don't recommend this hotel at all.
Good budget hotel. Near from Masjid Agung Baiturrahman. Easy to find delicious local food & souvenir.
Good budget hotel. Easy to find food, especially at night.
Cell like rooms with tiny Windows. Unfriendly staff
nice budget hotel

With hot water!
The breakfast no really Good.
Sure will come again

Good location in the middle of town. Lots of places to eat nearby. 

A bit expensive for what it is, but it seems to be better value than similar hotels in Banda Aceh. 

Hot water, air con, wifi (although it didn't always work in my room) and Indonesian-style breakfast were all nice.

reviews.reviewTitle: I stayed in a VIP room but I was disappointed.
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel is very noisy, no WIFI in the rooms, TV is very old no English channel. Staffs can't speak English except a receptionist lady.

Cleanliness: comfortable but must be improved more.

great experience with nice and pleasant treat from hotel's staff.

reviews.reviewComments: Siwah hotel is nice hotel. Located at Peunayong, one of the famous place in Banda Aceh especially for culinary. Not too far from Baiturrahman Mosque, one of the famous mosque in Indonesia, especially at Banda Aceh. Beside their history, this mosque has a great story when tsunami hit the Banda Aceh at December, 26th, 2004.
reviews.reviewPositives: Cheap budget near
Nice staff, good location, cheap

reviews.reviewComments:
First and foremost, I would like to highlight that the location of the hotel indicated on the map is inaccurate.  We spent close to an hour trying to look for the hotel only to realise that the hotel is located two streets away.

Apart from that the stay in Siwah Hotel is generally pleasant.  The room is clean and the bed is comfortable.  The wifi speed is fast.  The staffs are also friendly but they speaks little English.
reviews.reviewPositives: Clean room, comfortable bed, and within close proximity to city center.

Pues con una oferta de Agoda he pagado 5 euros por la habitación que es amplia, tiene AC y en una buena zona, gente amable, lo único a mejorar son lis colchones, el testo muy bien

El hotel estaba bastante viejo y sucio. El personal me trató muy bien y me ayudaron en todas mis preguntas. Me pidieron un taxi y fueron muy amables. El desayuno incluido en el precio no lo tomé porque era muy picante y estaba frío y yo no estoy acostumbrada a desayunar así. Tuve mala suerte con los vecinos de habilitación, una familia muy ruidosa y poco respetuosa. 

Me dio muy mala impresión ver la colcha con muchas manchas y la cortina de la ducha muy sucia también. La pintura de las paredes de hace varios años sucia y desconchada.

Pasé una noche allí porque salía hacía otro sitio pero no lo recomendaría.

Le personnel est agréable. La chambre confortable et propre. Il y a même de l'eau chaude. Le WiFi n'est pas disponible dans toutes les chambres. Un peu de bruit dans les couloirs et il est possible de fumer dans les parties communes.

reviews.reviewTitle: Tuk-tuk facile à trouver pour visiter la ville, établissement agréable.
reviews.reviewComments: Déçu de l'accueil glacial pour visiter l'extérieur de la grande mosquée, ayant contribué financièrement après le tsunami, c'est assez inattendu.
Bien situé pour aller au night market et au fish market

Die Lage des Hotels ist gut mitten im Stadtzentrum und das Zimmer war gross, das Bett gemütlich. Leider roch es recht streng, da es ein Raucherhotel ist und die  Klimaanlage war etwas laut. Wir hatten warmes Wasser und guten Wasserdruck. Leider roch es aber auch in Bad nicht sehr gut. Zum Frühstück gab es leckeren Reis mit Ei.

reviews.reviewPositives: Lage, Service & Preis/Leistungsverhältnis

reviews.reviewComments:
Personeel sprak slecht Engels
Kamer stonk

reviews.reviewTitle: Goede locatie voor 1 nacht slapen, niet schoon
reviews.reviewComments: Ons verblijf was matig, dit had te maken met het feit dat de douchecabinevloer kapot was en wij moesten douchen in een cabine met scheuren in de vloer. Heel voorzichtig douchen en toch nog meer door de vloer gezakt met resultaat een bloedende voet en een douchecabinevloer die nu helemaal kapot is. De deuren waren heel vies met allemaal vingerafdrukken en de vloer in de gangen zaten ook onder de vlekken. Er hing een heel naar chemisch geurtje in de kamer die ik na een paar dagen nog rook aan mijn kleding. Het bed is goed, de kamer prima. Gewoon een hotel voor een overnachting op doorreis. Dan is het prima. Niet teveel luxe en hygiëne verwachten, maar voor 1 nacht vond ik dat ok. Dat de douchecabine totaal kapot was vond ik gewoon een erg minpunt omdat ik er ook nog eens verder doorheen zakte. Wat kun je verwachten voor 17 euro per nacht in een stad..
reviews.reviewPositives: lokatie, goed bed, basic ingericht
tem quarto confortavel espacoso e limpo

reviews.reviewComments: 全く問題ないコスパの良いホテル！またバンダアチェに行ったら泊まりたいです。
津波の影響もあったのか(？)古びた感はありますが、見た目より清潔に保たれていて、部屋の設備も申し分ありません。僕は 3階の部屋でしたが、唯一シャワーのお湯が 10分程出しっ放しにして置かないと到達しませんが、出始めれば充分に熱く、切れる事もありません。アチェの中では最高でした。
LANTAI KAMAR KECIL SANGAY LIMCIM

Book for 3 room. Room no 204 & 206 flood in bathroom. No lift and wifi just at main lobby. Simple breakfast 1 rice and coffee/tea & 1 cup mineral water. The hotel always switch off the light at main lobby and along corridor at room. Others is okey. Not so recommanded.
melancong tempat kesan tsunami
Hotel ini ok sesuai dgn harganya kemudahan dan penyedian Utk sarapan Perlu dipertingkatkan lagi.

reviews.reviewComments: Hi saya dari Malaysia. Hotel siwah memang terbaik untuk yang mahukan hotel bajet di Aceh. Semua ok tapi hanya tiada tingkap sahaja.

semuanya bagus dan berpuas hati... sikit kecewa dengan sarapan yg terlalu simple..... hanya sebungkus nasi.....lain2 semua ok....dekat dengan pasar....hanya berjalan kaki beberapa minit sahaja. utk percutian akan dtg hanya hotel ini menjadi pilihan. minta upgrade sarapan agar pelanggan lebih berpuas hati

reviews.reviewComments:
Kami bercuti di Aceh seramai 7 dewasa dan 5 kanak-kanak. Saya telah booking sebanyak 4 buah bilik dan bilik kami adalah unit eksekutif. Puas hati kerna unit kami ada bath tub untuk anak2 berendam setiap pagi sebelum kami berjalan-jalan.

Secara keseluruhan hotel ini memuaskan dan harganya amat berpatutan.
reviews.reviewPositives: Harganya sangat berpatutan, keadaan bilik kemas dan lokasi hotel strategik

reviews.reviewComments: sangat berpuas hati dan akan tinggal di siwah hotel jika ke Banda Acheh lagi. Saya akan cadangkan rakan-rakan tinggal di Siwah Hotel jika ke Banda Acheh
reviews.reviewPositives: bersih, bilik selesa dan friendly staff

reviews.reviewComments: 不推荐
酒店位置不错的，步行10分钟就可以到市区中心，旁边有个菜市场，做什么都很方便，转机也合适
价格便宜，适合中转。
酒店设施非常老，不过位置不错，中转飞机还是可以住的
位置一流，清洁度很差，设施陈旧！
Kamar bagus, fasilitas ok, pelayanan bagus, InsyaAllah datang lagi..
Dengan harga yang saya dapat saya puas karna semua nya oke. TV sudah TV berlangganan. Cuma 1 kekurangan nya. Parkiran agak susah kalau udah rame. Dekat ke pusat kuliner juga.
lumayan oke krn di pusat kota, ac dingin, tv sdh terhubung dengan youtube/netflix, wifi kencang. air panas tidak berfungsi. staff nya masih merokok di dekat lobby

Tempat yg bagus untuk menginap,dgn harga yg sangat terjangkau dapat tempat yg menyenangkan.
Kurangnya adalah lobinya bau rokok Krn dijadikan tempat merokok , lorong kamar terkadang juga bau rokok
Hotel under 200K order lewat agoda udah 2 bed, AC, TV, Toilet didalam + water hitter, handuk, alat mandi.
Pemesanan hotel melalui Agoda info dapat sarapan pagi. Sesampainya di Hotel, pihak hotel mengatakan sudah tidak ada sarapan pagi lagi. Kecewa.

Saya, Aguswardi Hasdi, melakukan pemesanan di Siwah Hotel melalui Agoda. Saya seharusnya check-in pukul 14.00, namun sebelumnya saya sudah mengajukan permintaan pembatalan karena akan terlambat check-in.
Saat tiba, saya justru dipindahkan ke hotel lain tanpa penjelasan yang jelas.
Kondisi kamar di hotel pengganti sangat tidak layak: kepala tempat tidur rusak, TV tidak berfungsi, tidak tersedia shower (hanya bak mandi), tidak ada gantungan handuk, tidak tersedia WiFi, serta kamar dalam kondisi kurang bersih dan terdapat bau yang tidak nyaman.
Fasilitas yang diberikan sangat tidak sesuai dengan yang tertera pada aplikasi saat pemesanan.
Karena saya datang bersama keluarga dan sudah malam, saya terpaksa tetap menginap dalam kondisi tersebut. Namun pengalaman ini sangat mengecewakan dan merugikan.
Saya berharap pihak Siwah Hotel dapat lebih bertanggung jawab dan tidak memindahkan tamu ke properti lain dengan kondisi yang jauh di bawah standar tanpa konfirmasi yang jelas.
Lambat 10mnt langsung dipotong deposit hotel terburuk

Kecewa uy, gua pesan hotel udh include breakfast, tau nya di hotel ini kaga ada, katanya di anter sama si agoda team sendiri. Sengaja paginya gua tunggu sampe jam 8. And kaga kunjung tiba, akhir nya gua tinggal kerja dong. Nah sore pas gua pulang mau rehat, nah loh kamar gua persis sama kayak gua tinggal pergi pagi, alias kaga di servis uy. Stelah gua komplen besoknya baru di bersihkan tu kamar. Tp yg sarapan td tetap kagak ada (rugi pesanan gua brarti).
Sooo, klw utk nginap 1 malam sih kayaknya bisa, tp tdk rekom utk beberapa malam. Oh iya air panas untuk mandi juga kaga fungsi.

untuk sebuah hotel budget, keadaan kamarnya bersih, nyaman dan yang paling utama adalah lokasinya yang berdekatan dengan food court sehingga memudahkan ketika ingin berwisata kuliner.

Hotel di Aceh dg fas minim sekali, terletak di dalam pasar, jalan depan yg gelap dan hotel yg bener2 gelap, sempat ragu utk tinggal disitu krn seram. Sy dapat kamar dr Agoda krn lihat fotonya yg ternyata berbeda skl. Sy dpt kamar hotel yg tanpa jendela ke luar, shg sumpek dan lembab. Kmr mandi kotor, kyk tdk pernah disikat, AC panas, bed keras. Semakin ingin cpt kluar. Yg surprise pg nya sy ditagih bayar, krn ternyata wlu pake Credit Card via Agoda hanya utk pesan ttp bayar di property tau bgtu klu  semalam dikasih tau dr awal sy tdk akan masuk kamar, ttp cari hotel yg lbh terang dan baik. Kejutan ke 2 adalah break fast nya nasi bungkus dg piring satu2.....yah Warung banget deg, but sesuai dg harganya. Pesan sy jgn tertipu dg hrg yg murah,

reviews.reviewTitle: Lokasi Hotel Yang Dekat Dengan Pusat Kuliner
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel ini letaknya cukup strategis dekat dengan pusat kuliner dan harga yang ditawarkan cukup konpetitip
Yaa nyaman lah untuk tidur dikamar dengan harga yang sesuai
Senang bisa bermalam di hotel ini, standart tapi oke punya sesuai harga, ada harga ada qualitas
Overall bagus, all staffs are friendly. Tapi, tv jadul dan tidak ada lift

reviews.reviewTitle: Lokasi hotel yang cukup strategis dekat dengan kuliner
reviews.reviewComments: Secara keseluruhan menginap di hotel ini cukup memuaskan, harga yang ditawarkan dan fasilitas yang diberikan sepadan
Cocok untuk traveller
Daei segi Harga Murah, kamar Nyaman dan  puas untuk bermalam di hotel ini
Hotel ini berbadakan bangunan Ruko, kecil sederhana tapi oke buat stay.
Wifi nya tdk bsa d gunakan bila sdh d kmr...
